summary: Default `outputformat` flag to `"json"` on all 5 PVGIS endpoint commands so the CLI sends `outputformat=json` automatically.
reason: PVGIS endpoints return CSV-style tab-separated text when `outputformat` is omitted, even though the CLI asks for JSON via `--json`. The generator left the flag default empty and gated the query param on `flagOutputformat != ""`, so the param was never sent. Changing the default to `"json"` flows through the existing gate and makes the CLI's JSON output match the spec without requiring users to pass `--outputformat json` explicitly.
validated_outcome: After the patch, `radiation --lat 45 --lon 9 --horizontal 1 --json` returns the documented JSON shape (inputs/outputs/meta) instead of plaintext CSV embedded in a JSON string.
